name: Yggdrasil Access Key
effect: Once per session as a Basic Action, interface this key with any terminal or data structure in the Digital World. Make an Archive check DN 15. On a success the GM reveals one piece of hidden information about the Digital World's current state — a system function, a locked area's contents, or what Yggdrasil is actively working on. On a failure the attempt fails and the key must cool down before it can be used again.
notes: 1/session. Archive check DN 15. Failure: key cannot be used again until next session.
